# Copilot Instructions

## Coding Style Preferences

- Prefer simple, practical code over heavy architecture.
- Keep comments minimal; only add comments when they clarify non-obvious logic.
- Avoid unnecessary boilerplate and avoid over-engineering.
- Do not add extra security hardening unless explicitly requested.

## Communication Behavior

- Ask clarifying questions when requirements are ambiguous, incomplete, or conflicting.
- If uncertain about user intent, pause and confirm before implementing.

## Working Approach

- Make small, focused changes.
- Preserve existing behavior unless a behavior change is requested.
- Keep outputs concise and actionable.
- edit the instructions or doc files directly when new preferences or changes are needed.
